name: Sweet Potato Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/8 teaspoon grated nutmeg, or to taste
1/4 teaspoon ground cloves, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Peel and boil the sweet potatoes until tender.
3. Drain the boiled sweet potatoes and mash them with butter, sugar, milk, egg yolks, salt, nutmeg, cinnamon, ground cloves, and vanilla extract until smooth.
4. Stir in the egg whites until fully incorporated.
5. Pour the mixture into a prepared pie crust and bake for 45-50 minutes or until set.
6. Turn off the oven and let cool on a wire rack.
